markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting between Sunbit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and SEO collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sunbit aims to increase brand awareness and become a household name, with a focus on driving site traffic and shop directory hits](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Primary verticals are dentistry and auto repair, with potential to expand to other services](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Content strategy will focus on informational topics related to services, avoiding direct financing discussions due to regulatory concerns](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Legal and bank approval processes are required but can be streamlined for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [GrowthX will start with keyword research and content creation for dental and auto repair verticals](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)

## Topics

### Sunbit Overview

  - [Jason Beltran has been with Sunbit for 5.5 years, growing from $20M to $350M+ annual revenue](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [B2B2C model: merchants promote Sunbit to their customers](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=1912.0)
  - [Average loan amount: $1,000; average loan length: 12 months](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [30% of customers use Sunbit more than once](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=1671.0)
  - [60% of customers are women; average customer age is 35](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)

### Target Audience and Positioning

  - [Focus on brick-and-mortar services, not e-commerce](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=2504.0)
  - [Emphasis on "needs" (e.g., dental work, auto repairs) rather than "wants"](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=2518.0)
  - [Avoid terms like "affordability"; prefer "budget-friendly"](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=2442.0)
  - [Target both consumers (B2C) and small businesses (B2B), especially dental practices](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Avoid direct discussions about financing due to regulatory concerns](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=2315.0)
  - [Focus on informational content related to services (e.g., dental care tips, tire maintenance)](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=2702.0)
  - [Goal: Associate Sunbit with dentistry and auto services in consumers' minds](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=2710.0)
  - [Utilize American Dental Association as a credible source for dental information](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=2685.0)

### SEO and Traffic Goals

  - [Current site has good authority due to merchant backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
  - [Aim to increase keyword volume and organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
  - [Target: 5x traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [Competitors to watch: CareCredit, Cherry.com](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=3155.0)

### Content Creation and Approval Process

  - [WordPress CMS for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=2792.0)
  - [Legal team and bank must approve all content](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=2915.0)
  - [Streamlined approval process possible if content stays within certain parameters](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=2941.0)
  - [Need to log all published content for potential audits](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=2922.0)

### Analytics and Tracking

  - [Access needed for WordPress, Google Search Console, Google Analytics](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=3197.0)
  - [Mixpanel used for tracking from shop directory to purchase](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=3247.0)
  - [Plans to tag entire website with Mixpanel for full funnel tracking](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=3257.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send team email for access to various platforms](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=3230.0)
  - [Jason to share:](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=3545.0)
      - [Example article sent to legal team](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=3531.0)
      - [Writing style guide and brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=3536.0)
      - [Customer profile data](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=3545.0)
  - [GrowthX to review company brief with Jason](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=3555.0)
  - [Start keyword research for dental and auto repair verticals](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
  - [Develop initial content pieces for review](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
  - [Explore automation possibilities with Monday.com for content workflow](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=3408.0)
  - [Consider additional verticals or content depth for future expansion](https://fathom.video/share/GPQ1eeHh-WhiF3fuHWdr5CAL4as3PtkS?tab=summary&timestamp=3469.0)
